word: G4087 - πικραίνω - pikraínō - pik-rah'-ee-no - Be bitter

sections.paragraph:
- Original: πικραίνω

- Transliteration: Pikraino

- Phonetic: pik-rah'-ee-no

- Definition:

1. to make bitter

a. to produce a bitter taste in the stomach

2. to embitter. exasperate

a. render angry, indignant

b. to be embittered, irritated

c. to visit with bitterness, to grieve (deal bitterly with)

- Origin: from G4089

- TDNT entry: 08:02,8

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G4089; to embitter (literally or figuratively): - be (make) bitter.
